# Area Name

Goal:

## Scope

- [ ] What belongs here?
- [ ] What is explicitly out of scope?
- [ ] Who owns this area?
- [ ] Which systems are sources of truth?

## Steps

- [ ] Step.
- [ ] Step.
- [ ] Step.

## Verification

- [ ] What proves this step is done?
- [ ] Which artifact is attached?
- [ ] Who accepts it?

## Operation

- [ ] Who maintains it?
- [ ] How often is it reviewed?
- [ ] Which metric shows it still works?
